javascript:(() => {
  'use strict';

  const GLOBAL_KEY = '__enterToNewlineBookmarkletController__';
  const VERSION = '1.0.0';
  const HOST_ID = 'enter-to-newline-bookmarklet-host';
  const POSITION_STORAGE_KEY = 'enter-to-newline-bookmarklet-position-v1';
  const MAX_LOG_ENTRIES = 40;
  const DISPLAYED_LOG_ENTRIES = 12;

  const existingController = window[GLOBAL_KEY];

  if (existingController && typeof existingController.destroy === 'function') {
    try {
      existingController.destroy({ reason: 'bookmarklet-toggle' });
    } catch (error) {
      console.error('[Enter to Newline] Failed to deactivate the existing controller.', error);
      document.getElementById(HOST_ID)?.remove();
      delete window[GLOBAL_KEY];
    }
    return;
  }

  document.getElementById(HOST_ID)?.remove();

  const platform = navigator.userAgentData?.platform || navigator.platform || '';
  const isMac = /mac|iphone|ipad|ipod/i.test(platform);
  const sendShortcutLabel = isMac ? 'Cmd+Enter' : 'Ctrl+Enter';

  const locators = Object.freeze({
    editable: Object.freeze([
      Object.freeze({
        id: 'textarea',
        selector: 'textarea',
        description: 'an enabled textarea element'
      }),
      Object.freeze({
        id: 'contenteditable',
        selector: '[contenteditable="true"]',
        description: 'an element explicitly marked contenteditable=true'
      }),
      Object.freeze({
        id: 'lexical-editor',
        selector: '[data-lexical-editor="true"]',
        description: 'a Lexical editor root or container'
      }),
      Object.freeze({
        id: 'textbox-role',
        selector: '[role="textbox"]',
        description: 'an element exposing the textbox accessibility role'
      })
    ]),
    send: Object.freeze([
      Object.freeze({
        id: 'chatgpt-send-button',
        selector: 'button[data-testid="send-button"]',
        description: 'the ChatGPT send button identified by data-testid=send-button'
      }),
      Object.freeze({
        id: 'composer-submit-button',
        selector: 'button[data-testid="composer-submit-button"]',
        description: 'a composer submit button identified by data-testid=composer-submit-button'
      }),
      Object.freeze({
        id: 'accessible-send-button',
        selector: 'button[aria-label="Send" i], button[aria-label^="Send " i], button[aria-label*="Send message" i], button[aria-label*="Send prompt" i]',
        description: 'an enabled button whose accessible label describes a send action'
      })
    ])
  });

  const state = {
    active: true,
    destroyed: false,
    host: null,
    shadow: null,
    ui: {},
    cleanupTasks: [],
    logEntries: [],
    sequence: 0,
    counters: {
      newlines: 0,
      sends: 0,
      warnings: 0,
      errors: 0
    },
    drag: null,
    warnedElements: new WeakSet(),
    repeatedLogTimes: new Map(),
    themeQuery: null
  };

  const controller = {
    version: VERSION,
    destroy: options => destroy(options),
    getDiagnostics: () => ({
      version: VERSION,
      active: state.active,
      counters: { ...state.counters },
      logs: state.logEntries.map(entry => ({ ...entry }))
    })
  };

  window[GLOBAL_KEY] = controller;

  const addCleanup = cleanup => {
    state.cleanupTasks.push(cleanup);
  };

  const listen = (target, type, handler, options) => {
    target.addEventListener(type, handler, options);
    addCleanup(() => target.removeEventListener(type, handler, options));
  };

  const truncate = (value, length = 120) => {
    const text = String(value ?? '');
    return text.length <= length ? text : `${text.slice(0, length - 1)}...`;
  };

  const describeElement = element => {
    if (!(element instanceof Element)) {
      return 'no element';
    }

    const attributes = [
      ['id', element.id],
      ['role', element.getAttribute('role')],
      ['contenteditable', element.getAttribute('contenteditable')],
      ['aria-label', element.getAttribute('aria-label')],
      ['data-testid', element.getAttribute('data-testid')],
      ['data-lexical-editor', element.getAttribute('data-lexical-editor')]
    ]
      .filter(([, value]) => value)
      .map(([name, value]) => `${name}="${truncate(value, 80)}"`);

    const classNames = typeof element.className === 'string'
      ? element.className.trim().split(/\s+/).filter(Boolean).slice(0, 4)
      : [];

    const classDescription = classNames.length ? ` class="${classNames.join(' ')}"` : '';
    const attributeDescription = attributes.length ? ` ${attributes.join(' ')}` : '';

    return `<${element.tagName.toLowerCase()}${attributeDescription}${classDescription}>`;
  };

  const serializeContext = context => {
    const entries = Object.entries(context || {}).filter(([, value]) => value !== undefined && value !== null && value !== '');
    return entries.map(([key, value]) => `${key}=${truncate(typeof value === 'string' ? value : JSON.stringify(value), 160)}`).join('; ');
  };

  const renderCounters = () => {
    if (!state.ui.counters) {
      return;
    }

    state.ui.counters.textContent = `New lines: ${state.counters.newlines} | Sends: ${state.counters.sends} | Warnings: ${state.counters.warnings} | Errors: ${state.counters.errors}`;
  };

  const renderLogs = () => {
    if (!state.ui.logList) {
      return;
    }

    state.ui.logList.replaceChildren();

    const visibleEntries = state.logEntries.slice(-DISPLAYED_LOG_ENTRIES).reverse();

    for (const entry of visibleEntries) {
      const item = document.createElement('li');
      item.className = `log-entry log-entry--${entry.level}`;

      const header = document.createElement('div');
      header.className = 'log-entry__header';
      header.textContent = `${entry.time} ${entry.level.toUpperCase()} ${entry.operation}`;

      const message = document.createElement('div');
      message.className = 'log-entry__message';
      message.textContent = entry.message;

      item.append(header, message);

      if (entry.context) {
        const context = document.createElement('div');
        context.className = 'log-entry__context';
        context.textContent = entry.context;
        item.append(context);
      }

      state.ui.logList.append(item);
    }
  };

  const setStatus = (level, message) => {
    if (!state.ui.status) {
      return;
    }

    state.ui.status.dataset.level = level;
    state.ui.status.textContent = message;
  };

  const writeLog = (level, operation, message, context = {}, options = {}) => {
    const throttleKey = options.throttleKey;
    const throttleMs = options.throttleMs ?? 3000;
    const now = Date.now();

    if (throttleKey) {
      const previousTime = state.repeatedLogTimes.get(throttleKey) || 0;
      if (now - previousTime < throttleMs) {
        return;
      }
      state.repeatedLogTimes.set(throttleKey, now);
    }

    const entry = {
      id: ++state.sequence,
      time: new Date(now).toLocaleTimeString([], { hour12: false }),
      level,
      operation,
      message,
      context: serializeContext(context)
    };

    state.logEntries.push(entry);
    if (state.logEntries.length > MAX_LOG_ENTRIES) {
      state.logEntries.splice(0, state.logEntries.length - MAX_LOG_ENTRIES);
    }

    if (level === 'warning') {
      state.counters.warnings += 1;
    }

    if (level === 'error') {
      state.counters.errors += 1;
    }

    const consoleMethod = level === 'error' ? 'error' : level === 'warning' ? 'warn' : 'info';
    console[consoleMethod](`[Enter to Newline] ${operation}: ${message}`, context);

    renderCounters();
    renderLogs();

    if (level === 'error' && state.ui.activityDetails) {
      state.ui.activityDetails.open = true;
    }
  };

  const reportError = (operation, error, context = {}) => {
    const normalizedError = error instanceof Error ? error : new Error(String(error));
    writeLog('error', operation, normalizedError.message || 'An unknown error occurred.', {
      ...context,
      errorName: normalizedError.name,
      stack: truncate(normalizedError.stack || '', 300)
    });
    setStatus('error', `${operation} failed. Open Activity for details.`);
  };

  const isAriaDisabled = element => element.getAttribute('aria-disabled') === 'true';

  const isEligibleTextarea = element => element instanceof HTMLTextAreaElement && !element.disabled && !element.readOnly && !isAriaDisabled(element);

  const isEligibleContenteditable = element => {
    if (!(element instanceof HTMLElement) || isAriaDisabled(element)) {
      return false;
    }

    return element.isContentEditable || element.getAttribute('contenteditable') === 'true';
  };

  const findNestedEditable = container => {
    if (!(container instanceof Element)) {
      return null;
    }

    const candidates = container.querySelectorAll('textarea, [contenteditable="true"]');

    for (const candidate of candidates) {
      if (isEligibleTextarea(candidate) || isEligibleContenteditable(candidate)) {
        return candidate;
      }
    }

    return null;
  };

  const collectPathElements = event => {
    const path = typeof event.composedPath === 'function' ? event.composedPath() : [event.target];
    return path.filter(node => node instanceof Element);
  };

  const matchLocator = (element, locator) => {
    try {
      if (element.matches(locator.selector)) {
        return element;
      }

      return element.closest(locator.selector);
    } catch (error) {
      reportError('locator.match', error, {
        locatorId: locator.id,
        selector: locator.selector,
        description: locator.description,
        element: describeElement(element)
      });
      return null;
    }
  };

  const resolveEditableTarget = event => {
    const pathElements = collectPathElements(event);
    const visited = new Set();
    let unsupportedMatch = null;

    for (const pathElement of pathElements) {
      for (const locator of locators.editable) {
        const candidate = matchLocator(pathElement, locator);

        if (!candidate || visited.has(candidate)) {
          continue;
        }

        visited.add(candidate);

        if (isEligibleTextarea(candidate)) {
          return { element: candidate, locator };
        }

        if (isEligibleContenteditable(candidate)) {
          return { element: candidate, locator };
        }

        const nestedEditable = findNestedEditable(candidate);
        if (nestedEditable) {
          return {
            element: nestedEditable,
            locator,
            resolvedFromContainer: candidate
          };
        }

        unsupportedMatch ||= { element: candidate, locator };
      }
    }

    return { element: null, unsupportedMatch };
  };

  const focusElement = element => {
    try {
      element.focus({ preventScroll: true });
    } catch (error) {
      element.focus();
      writeLog('warning', 'editable.focus', 'Focus options were not accepted; focus() was called without options.', {
        target: describeElement(element),
        error: error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error)
      }, {
        throttleKey: 'focus-options-fallback',
        throttleMs: 10000
      });
    }
  };

  const dispatchInputEvent = (element, inputType, data) => {
    try {
      const inputEvent = new InputEvent('input', {
        bubbles: true,
        composed: true,
        cancelable: false,
        inputType,
        data
      });
      element.dispatchEvent(inputEvent);
      return 'InputEvent';
    } catch (error) {
      const fallbackEvent = new Event('input', { bubbles: true, composed: true });
      element.dispatchEvent(fallbackEvent);
      writeLog('warning', 'input.dispatch', 'InputEvent construction failed; a generic input event was dispatched instead.', {
        target: describeElement(element),
        inputType,
        error: error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error)
      }, {
        throttleKey: 'input-event-fallback',
        throttleMs: 10000
      });
      return 'Event';
    }
  };

  const insertTextareaNewline = textarea => {
    const start = textarea.selectionStart ?? textarea.value.length;
    const end = textarea.selectionEnd ?? textarea.value.length;
    const previousLength = textarea.value.length;

    focusElement(textarea);
    textarea.setRangeText('\n', start, end, 'end');
    const eventType = dispatchInputEvent(textarea, 'insertLineBreak', '\n');

    const expectedLength = previousLength - (end - start) + 1;
    if (textarea.value.length !== expectedLength || textarea.value.charAt(start) !== '\n') {
      throw new Error('The textarea value did not contain the expected newline after setRangeText completed.');
    }

    return {
      strategy: 'HTMLTextAreaElement.setRangeText',
      inputEvent: eventType,
      selectionStart: start,
      selectionEnd: end
    };
  };

  const ensureSelectionInside = editable => {
    const selection = window.getSelection();

    if (!selection) {
      throw new Error('window.getSelection() returned no Selection object.');
    }

    if (selection.rangeCount > 0) {
      const currentRange = selection.getRangeAt(0);
      if (editable.contains(currentRange.commonAncestorContainer)) {
        return { selection, range: currentRange };
      }
    }

    const range = document.createRange();
    range.selectNodeContents(editable);
    range.collapse(false);
    selection.removeAllRanges();
    selection.addRange(range);

    return { selection, range };
  };

  const insertRangeNewline = editable => {
    const { selection, range } = ensureSelectionInside(editable);

    range.deleteContents();

    const lineBreak = document.createElement('br');
    range.insertNode(lineBreak);

    if (!lineBreak.nextSibling) {
      const trailingBreak = document.createElement('br');
      lineBreak.parentNode?.insertBefore(trailingBreak, lineBreak.nextSibling);
    }

    const caretRange = document.createRange();
    caretRange.setStartAfter(lineBreak);
    caretRange.collapse(true);
    selection.removeAllRanges();
    selection.addRange(caretRange);

    dispatchInputEvent(editable, 'insertLineBreak', null);

    if (!editable.contains(lineBreak)) {
      throw new Error('The fallback range insertion did not leave the line break inside the editable element.');
    }

    return {
      strategy: 'Range.insertNode',
      inputEvent: 'synthetic input event'
    };
  };

  const insertContenteditableNewline = editable => {
    focusElement(editable);
    ensureSelectionInside(editable);

    if (typeof document.execCommand === 'function') {
      try {
        const accepted = document.execCommand('insertLineBreak', false, null);
        if (accepted) {
          return {
            strategy: 'document.execCommand(insertLineBreak)',
            inputEvent: 'browser-managed'
          };
        }
      } catch (error) {
        writeLog('warning', 'newline.execCommand', 'The browser rejected the insertLineBreak command; range insertion will be used.', {
          target: describeElement(editable),
          error: error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error)
        }, {
          throttleKey: 'exec-command-failure',
          throttleMs: 5000
        });
      }
    }

    return insertRangeNewline(editable);
  };

  const insertNewline = resolvedTarget => {
    const editable = resolvedTarget.element;

    if (isEligibleTextarea(editable)) {
      return insertTextareaNewline(editable);
    }

    if (isEligibleContenteditable(editable)) {
      return insertContenteditableNewline(editable);
    }

    throw new Error('The resolved target is no longer editable.');
  };

  const getAssociatedForm = editable => {
    if (editable instanceof HTMLTextAreaElement && editable.form) {
      return editable.form;
    }

    let current = editable;

    while (current instanceof Element) {
      const form = current.closest('form');
      if (form) {
        return form;
      }

      const root = current.getRootNode();
      current = root instanceof ShadowRoot ? root.host : null;
    }

    return null;
  };

  const isActionableControl = element => {
    if (!(element instanceof HTMLElement)) {
      return false;
    }

    if ('disabled' in element && element.disabled) {
      return false;
    }

    if (element.hidden || isAriaDisabled(element)) {
      return false;
    }

    const style = getComputedStyle(element);
    return style.display !== 'none' && style.visibility !== 'hidden';
  };

  const findSubmitControls = form => {
    const controls = Array.from(form.querySelectorAll('button[type="submit"], input[type="submit"], button:not([type])'));
    return {
      all: controls,
      actionable: controls.find(isActionableControl) || null
    };
  };

  const collectSearchRoots = (editable, form) => {
    const roots = [];
    const addRoot = root => {
      if (root && !roots.includes(root) && typeof root.querySelector === 'function') {
        roots.push(root);
      }
    };

    addRoot(form);
    addRoot(editable.getRootNode());
    addRoot(document);

    return roots;
  };

  const resolveSendAction = editable => {
    const form = getAssociatedForm(editable);

    if (form) {
      const submitControls = findSubmitControls(form);

      if (typeof form.requestSubmit === 'function' && (submitControls.actionable || submitControls.all.length === 0)) {
        return {
          action: {
            id: 'form-request-submit',
            description: submitControls.actionable
              ? 'submit the nearest form through requestSubmit with its enabled submit control'
              : 'submit the nearest form through requestSubmit because the form has no explicit submit control',
            target: submitControls.actionable || form,
            execute: () => submitControls.actionable ? form.requestSubmit(submitControls.actionable) : form.requestSubmit()
          },
          diagnostics: {
            form: describeElement(form),
            explicitSubmitControlCount: submitControls.all.length
          }
        };
      }

      if (submitControls.actionable) {
        return {
          action: {
            id: 'form-submit-control',
            description: 'activate the enabled submit control in the nearest form',
            target: submitControls.actionable,
            execute: () => submitControls.actionable.click()
          },
          diagnostics: {
            form: describeElement(form),
            explicitSubmitControlCount: submitControls.all.length
          }
        };
      }
    }

    const searchRoots = collectSearchRoots(editable, form);
    const ambiguities = [];

    for (const locator of locators.send) {
      const candidates = [];
      const seen = new Set();

      for (const root of searchRoots) {
        let matches = [];

        try {
          matches = Array.from(root.querySelectorAll(locator.selector));
        } catch (error) {
          reportError('send.locator', error, {
            locatorId: locator.id,
            selector: locator.selector,
            description: locator.description
          });
          continue;
        }

        for (const candidate of matches) {
          if (!seen.has(candidate) && isActionableControl(candidate)) {
            seen.add(candidate);
            candidates.push(candidate);
          }
        }
      }

      if (candidates.length === 1) {
        const candidate = candidates[0];
        return {
          action: {
            id: locator.id,
            description: locator.description,
            target: candidate,
            execute: () => candidate.click()
          },
          diagnostics: {
            locatorId: locator.id,
            candidateCount: 1
          }
        };
      }

      if (candidates.length > 1) {
        ambiguities.push({
          locatorId: locator.id,
          selector: locator.selector,
          candidateCount: candidates.length,
          candidates: candidates.slice(0, 4).map(describeElement)
        });
      }
    }

    return {
      action: null,
      diagnostics: {
        form: describeElement(form),
        ambiguities
      }
    };
  };

  const isPlainEnter = event => event.key === 'Enter'
    && !event.shiftKey
    && !event.ctrlKey
    && !event.metaKey
    && !event.altKey;

  const isSendShortcut = event => {
    if (event.key !== 'Enter' || event.shiftKey || event.altKey) {
      return false;
    }

    return isMac
      ? event.metaKey && !event.ctrlKey
      : event.ctrlKey && !event.metaKey;
  };

  const handlePlainEnter = (event, resolvedTarget) => {
    event.preventDefault();
    event.stopImmediatePropagation();

    const targetDescription = describeElement(resolvedTarget.element);

    writeLog('info', 'newline.intercept', 'Plain Enter was intercepted for newline insertion.', {
      target: targetDescription,
      locatorId: resolvedTarget.locator.id,
      locator: resolvedTarget.locator.selector,
      resolvedFromContainer: describeElement(resolvedTarget.resolvedFromContainer)
    });

    try {
      const result = insertNewline(resolvedTarget);
      state.counters.newlines += 1;
      renderCounters();
      setStatus('success', `New line inserted using ${result.strategy}.`);
      writeLog('info', 'newline.insert', 'A newline was inserted successfully.', {
        target: targetDescription,
        locatorId: resolvedTarget.locator.id,
        strategy: result.strategy,
        inputEvent: result.inputEvent,
        selectionStart: result.selectionStart,
        selectionEnd: result.selectionEnd
      });
    } catch (error) {
      reportError('newline.insert', error, {
        target: targetDescription,
        locatorId: resolvedTarget.locator.id,
        locator: resolvedTarget.locator.selector,
        locatorDescription: resolvedTarget.locator.description
      });
    }
  };

  const handleSendShortcut = (event, resolvedTarget) => {
    let resolution = null;

    try {
      resolution = resolveSendAction(resolvedTarget.element);
    } catch (error) {
      reportError('send.resolve', error, {
        target: describeElement(resolvedTarget.element),
        attemptedLocators: locators.send.map(locator => `${locator.id}:${locator.selector}`).join(' | ')
      });
      return;
    }

    const action = resolution.action;

    if (!action) {
      writeLog('warning', 'send.resolve', `No unambiguous send action was found. ${sendShortcutLabel} was passed to the page unchanged.`, {
        target: describeElement(resolvedTarget.element),
        expectedForm: 'nearest ancestor form with requestSubmit or an enabled submit control',
        attemptedLocators: locators.send.map(locator => `${locator.id}:${locator.selector}`).join(' | '),
        resolutionDiagnostics: resolution.diagnostics
      }, {
        throttleKey: `send-action-missing:${describeElement(resolvedTarget.element)}`,
        throttleMs: 5000
      });
      setStatus('warning', 'No unambiguous send control was found. The shortcut was passed to the page.');
      return;
    }

    event.preventDefault();
    event.stopImmediatePropagation();

    try {
      action.execute();
      state.counters.sends += 1;
      renderCounters();
      setStatus('success', `Send command issued using ${action.description}.`);
      writeLog('info', 'send.execute', 'The send action was invoked successfully.', {
        shortcut: sendShortcutLabel,
        actionId: action.id,
        actionDescription: action.description,
        target: describeElement(action.target),
        editor: describeElement(resolvedTarget.element)
      });
    } catch (error) {
      reportError('send.execute', error, {
        shortcut: sendShortcutLabel,
        actionId: action.id,
        actionDescription: action.description,
        target: describeElement(action.target),
        editor: describeElement(resolvedTarget.element)
      });
    }
  };

  const keydownHandler = event => {
    if (!state.active || state.destroyed || event.defaultPrevented || event.isComposing || event.keyCode === 229) {
      return;
    }

    if (!isPlainEnter(event) && !isSendShortcut(event)) {
      return;
    }

    try {
      const resolvedTarget = resolveEditableTarget(event);

      if (!resolvedTarget.element) {
        const unsupported = resolvedTarget.unsupportedMatch;

        if (unsupported && !state.warnedElements.has(unsupported.element)) {
          state.warnedElements.add(unsupported.element);
          writeLog('warning', 'editable.resolve', 'A textbox-like element matched a locator but no supported editable surface was found, so the key event was not changed.', {
            matchedElement: describeElement(unsupported.element),
            locatorId: unsupported.locator.id,
            locator: unsupported.locator.selector,
            locatorDescription: unsupported.locator.description,
            expected: 'an enabled textarea or a contenteditable=true element'
          });
          setStatus('warning', 'A textbox-like control was detected, but it is not safely editable.');
        }
        return;
      }

      if (isPlainEnter(event)) {
        handlePlainEnter(event, resolvedTarget);
        return;
      }

      handleSendShortcut(event, resolvedTarget);
    } catch (error) {
      reportError('keyboard.handle', error, {
        key: event.key,
        target: describeElement(event.target),
        composedPathLength: typeof event.composedPath === 'function' ? event.composedPath().length : 'unavailable'
      });
    }
  };

  const detectDarkTheme = () => {
    const documentDark = document.documentElement.classList.contains('dark') || document.body?.classList.contains('dark');
    return Boolean(documentDark || state.themeQuery?.matches);
  };

  const applyTheme = () => {
    if (!state.host) {
      return;
    }

    state.host.dataset.theme = detectDarkTheme() ? 'dark' : 'light';
  };

  const loadSavedPosition = () => {
    try {
      const value = localStorage.getItem(POSITION_STORAGE_KEY);
      if (!value) {
        return null;
      }

      const parsed = JSON.parse(value);
      if (!Number.isFinite(parsed.left) || !Number.isFinite(parsed.top)) {
        return null;
      }

      return parsed;
    } catch (error) {
      writeLog('warning', 'position.load', 'The saved panel position could not be read. The default position will be used.', {
        storageKey: POSITION_STORAGE_KEY,
        error: error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error)
      }, {
        throttleKey: 'position-load-failure',
        throttleMs: 10000
      });
      return null;
    }
  };

  const savePosition = () => {
    if (!state.host) {
      return;
    }

    const rect = state.host.getBoundingClientRect();

    try {
      localStorage.setItem(POSITION_STORAGE_KEY, JSON.stringify({
        left: Math.round(rect.left),
        top: Math.round(rect.top)
      }));
    } catch (error) {
      writeLog('warning', 'position.save', 'The panel position could not be saved.', {
        storageKey: POSITION_STORAGE_KEY,
        error: error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error)
      }, {
        throttleKey: 'position-save-failure',
        throttleMs: 10000
      });
    }
  };

  const clampPanelPosition = (left, top) => {
    if (!state.host) {
      return { left, top };
    }

    const rect = state.host.getBoundingClientRect();
    const margin = 8;
    const maximumLeft = Math.max(margin, window.innerWidth - rect.width - margin);
    const maximumTop = Math.max(margin, window.innerHeight - rect.height - margin);

    return {
      left: Math.min(Math.max(margin, left), maximumLeft),
      top: Math.min(Math.max(margin, top), maximumTop)
    };
  };

  const positionPanel = position => {
    if (!state.host || !position) {
      return;
    }

    const clamped = clampPanelPosition(position.left, position.top);
    state.host.style.left = `${clamped.left}px`;
    state.host.style.top = `${clamped.top}px`;
    state.host.style.right = 'auto';
  };

  const pointerDownHandler = event => {
    const handle = event.target instanceof Element ? event.target.closest('[data-drag-handle]') : null;
    const interactive = event.target instanceof Element ? event.target.closest('button, summary, a, input, select, textarea') : null;

    if (!handle || interactive || event.button !== 0 || !state.host) {
      return;
    }

    const rect = state.host.getBoundingClientRect();
    state.drag = {
      pointerId: event.pointerId,
      startX: event.clientX,
      startY: event.clientY,
      left: rect.left,
      top: rect.top
    };

    state.host.style.left = `${rect.left}px`;
    state.host.style.top = `${rect.top}px`;
    state.host.style.right = 'auto';
    handle.setPointerCapture?.(event.pointerId);
    event.preventDefault();
  };

  const pointerMoveHandler = event => {
    if (!state.drag || event.pointerId !== state.drag.pointerId || !state.host) {
      return;
    }

    const nextPosition = clampPanelPosition(
      state.drag.left + event.clientX - state.drag.startX,
      state.drag.top + event.clientY - state.drag.startY
    );

    state.host.style.left = `${nextPosition.left}px`;
    state.host.style.top = `${nextPosition.top}px`;
  };

  const pointerUpHandler = event => {
    if (!state.drag || event.pointerId !== state.drag.pointerId) {
      return;
    }

    state.drag = null;
    savePosition();
    writeLog('info', 'panel.move', 'The control panel was moved and its position was saved.', {
      position: state.host ? {
        left: Math.round(state.host.getBoundingClientRect().left),
        top: Math.round(state.host.getBoundingClientRect().top)
      } : 'unavailable'
    });
  };

  const createUi = () => {
    const host = document.createElement('div');
    host.id = HOST_ID;
    host.setAttribute('data-enter-to-newline-version', VERSION);
    host.style.position = 'fixed';
    host.style.top = '12px';
    host.style.right = '12px';
    host.style.zIndex = '2147483647';

    const shadow = host.attachShadow({ mode: 'open' });

    shadow.innerHTML = `
      <style>
        :host {
          all: initial;
          color-scheme: light;
          --window-bg: #f3f3f3;
          --window-panel: #ffffff;
          --window-border: #8b8b8b;
          --window-border-soft: #c8c8c8;
          --window-text: #111111;
          --window-muted: #5b5b5b;
          --window-accent: #0f6cbd;
          --window-success: #107c10;
          --window-warning: #8a5800;
          --window-error: #a4262c;
          --window-button: #e8e8e8;
          --window-button-hover: #dddddd;
          display: block;
          font-family: "Segoe UI", Tahoma, Arial, sans-serif;
          font-size: 13px;
          line-height: 1.35;
        }

        :host([data-theme="dark"]) {
          color-scheme: dark;
          --window-bg: #252525;
          --window-panel: #1f1f1f;
          --window-border: #6a6a6a;
          --window-border-soft: #444444;
          --window-text: #f1f1f1;
          --window-muted: #b9b9b9;
          --window-accent: #60a5fa;
          --window-success: #6ccb5f;
          --window-warning: #f0b429;
          --window-error: #ff8085;
          --window-button: #343434;
          --window-button-hover: #424242;
        }

        * {
          box-sizing: border-box;
        }

        .window {
          width: min(390px, calc(100vw - 16px));
          max-height: min(640px, calc(100vh - 16px));
          overflow: hidden;
          border: 1px solid var(--window-border);
          border-radius: 5px;
          background: var(--window-bg);
          color: var(--window-text);
          box-shadow: 0 6px 20px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.22);
        }

        .titlebar {
          display: flex;
          align-items: center;
          min-height: 34px;
          padding: 5px 5px 5px 9px;
          border-bottom: 1px solid var(--window-border-soft);
          background: var(--window-panel);
          cursor: move;
          user-select: none;
          touch-action: none;
        }

        .titlebar__indicator {
          width: 9px;
          height: 9px;
          margin-right: 8px;
          border-radius: 50%;
          background: var(--window-success);
          box-shadow: 0 0 0 1px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.18);
        }

        .titlebar__title {
          min-width: 0;
          flex: 1;
          overflow: hidden;
          font-weight: 600;
          text-overflow: ellipsis;
          white-space: nowrap;
        }

        button {
          font: inherit;
        }

        .close-button {
          width: 28px;
          height: 24px;
          border: 1px solid transparent;
          border-radius: 3px;
          background: transparent;
          color: var(--window-text);
          cursor: pointer;
          line-height: 20px;
        }

        .close-button:hover,
        .close-button:focus-visible {
          border-color: var(--window-border-soft);
          background: var(--window-error);
          color: #ffffff;
          outline: none;
        }

        .body {
          max-height: calc(min(640px, 100vh - 16px) - 35px);
          overflow: auto;
          padding: 12px;
        }

        .lead {
          margin: 0 0 10px;
        }

        .shortcut-grid {
          display: grid;
          grid-template-columns: max-content 1fr;
          gap: 6px 10px;
          margin: 0 0 10px;
          padding: 9px;
          border: 1px solid var(--window-border-soft);
          background: var(--window-panel);
        }

        kbd {
          min-width: 76px;
          padding: 2px 6px;
          border: 1px solid var(--window-border);
          border-radius: 3px;
          background: var(--window-button);
          color: var(--window-text);
          font: 12px/1.4 "Segoe UI", Tahoma, Arial, sans-serif;
          text-align: center;
          box-shadow: inset 0 -1px 0 rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.12);
        }

        .shortcut-description {
          align-self: center;
        }

        .status {
          margin: 0 0 8px;
          padding: 7px 8px;
          border-left: 3px solid var(--window-accent);
          background: var(--window-panel);
          color: var(--window-text);
        }

        .status[data-level="success"] {
          border-left-color: var(--window-success);
        }

        .status[data-level="warning"] {
          border-left-color: var(--window-warning);
        }

        .status[data-level="error"] {
          border-left-color: var(--window-error);
        }

        .counters {
          margin: 0 0 8px;
          color: var(--window-muted);
          font-size: 12px;
        }

        details {
          margin: 0 0 10px;
          border: 1px solid var(--window-border-soft);
          background: var(--window-panel);
        }

        summary {
          padding: 7px 8px;
          cursor: pointer;
          font-weight: 600;
          user-select: none;
        }

        .log-list {
          max-height: 210px;
          margin: 0;
          overflow: auto;
          padding: 0 8px 8px;
          list-style: none;
        }

        .log-entry {
          padding: 6px 0;
          border-top: 1px solid var(--window-border-soft);
        }

        .log-entry__header {
          color: var(--window-muted);
          font-size: 11px;
          font-weight: 600;
        }

        .log-entry--warning .log-entry__header {
          color: var(--window-warning);
        }

        .log-entry--error .log-entry__header {
          color: var(--window-error);
        }

        .log-entry__message {
          margin-top: 2px;
        }

        .log-entry__context {
          margin-top: 2px;
          color: var(--window-muted);
          font-family: Consolas, "Courier New", monospace;
          font-size: 10px;
          overflow-wrap: anywhere;
        }

        .actions {
          display: flex;
          justify-content: flex-end;
        }

        .deactivate-button {
          min-width: 92px;
          min-height: 30px;
          padding: 4px 12px;
          border: 1px solid var(--window-border);
          border-radius: 3px;
          background: var(--window-button);
          color: var(--window-text);
          cursor: pointer;
        }

        .deactivate-button:hover,
        .deactivate-button:focus-visible {
          background: var(--window-button-hover);
          outline: 2px solid var(--window-accent);
          outline-offset: 1px;
        }
      </style>
      <section class="window" role="dialog" aria-label="Enter to Newline mode controls">
        <header class="titlebar" data-drag-handle>
          <span class="titlebar__indicator" aria-hidden="true"></span>
          <span class="titlebar__title">Enter to Newline</span>
          <button class="close-button" type="button" data-action="deactivate" aria-label="Close this panel and deactivate Enter to Newline mode" title="Close and deactivate">x</button>
        </header>
        <div class="body">
          <p class="lead">Mode is active. Close this panel, press Deactivate, or run the bookmarklet again to restore the page's original keyboard behavior.</p>
          <div class="shortcut-grid" aria-label="Keyboard behavior">
            <kbd>Enter</kbd><span class="shortcut-description">Insert a new line</span>
            <kbd>${sendShortcutLabel}</kbd><span class="shortcut-description">Send through the nearest reliable page action</span>
          </div>
          <div class="status" data-level="info" role="status" aria-live="polite">Ready. Focus an editable text area or rich-text editor.</div>
          <div class="counters">New lines: 0 | Sends: 0 | Warnings: 0 | Errors: 0</div>
          <details>
            <summary>Activity and diagnostics</summary>
            <ol class="log-list" aria-label="Recent activity"></ol>
          </details>
          <div class="actions">
            <button class="deactivate-button" type="button" data-action="deactivate">Deactivate</button>
          </div>
        </div>
      </section>
    `;

    document.documentElement.appendChild(host);

    state.host = host;
    state.shadow = shadow;
    state.ui.status = shadow.querySelector('.status');
    state.ui.counters = shadow.querySelector('.counters');
    state.ui.logList = shadow.querySelector('.log-list');
    state.ui.activityDetails = shadow.querySelector('details');

    for (const button of shadow.querySelectorAll('[data-action="deactivate"]')) {
      listen(button, 'click', () => destroy({ reason: 'user-interface' }));
    }

    listen(shadow, 'pointerdown', pointerDownHandler);
    listen(window, 'pointermove', pointerMoveHandler, { capture: true });
    listen(window, 'pointerup', pointerUpHandler, { capture: true });
    listen(window, 'pointercancel', pointerUpHandler, { capture: true });

    const savedPosition = loadSavedPosition();
    requestAnimationFrame(() => positionPanel(savedPosition));

    applyTheme();
    renderCounters();
    renderLogs();
  };

  const destroy = ({ reason = 'unknown' } = {}) => {
    if (state.destroyed) {
      return;
    }

    state.destroyed = true;
    state.active = false;

    writeLog('info', 'lifecycle.deactivate', 'Enter to Newline mode is being deactivated and all installed resources will be removed.', {
      reason,
      cleanupTaskCount: state.cleanupTasks.length,
      version: VERSION
    });

    const cleanupErrors = [];

    while (state.cleanupTasks.length) {
      const cleanup = state.cleanupTasks.pop();
      try {
        cleanup();
      } catch (error) {
        cleanupErrors.push(error);
      }
    }

    state.host?.remove();
    state.host = null;
    state.shadow = null;

    if (window[GLOBAL_KEY] === controller) {
      delete window[GLOBAL_KEY];
    }

    if (cleanupErrors.length) {
      console.error('[Enter to Newline] One or more cleanup operations failed.', cleanupErrors);
    }

    console.info(`[Enter to Newline] Mode deactivated. reason=${reason}; cleanupErrors=${cleanupErrors.length}`);
  };

  const setup = () => {
    try {
      createUi();
      listen(window, 'keydown', keydownHandler, { capture: true });
      listen(window, 'resize', () => {
        if (!state.host) {
          return;
        }
        const rect = state.host.getBoundingClientRect();
        positionPanel({ left: rect.left, top: rect.top });
      });

      state.themeQuery = window.matchMedia?.('(prefers-color-scheme: dark)') || null;
      if (state.themeQuery) {
        if (typeof state.themeQuery.addEventListener === 'function') {
          listen(state.themeQuery, 'change', applyTheme);
        } else if (typeof state.themeQuery.addListener === 'function') {
          state.themeQuery.addListener(applyTheme);
          addCleanup(() => state.themeQuery?.removeListener?.(applyTheme));
        }
      }

      const healthInterval = window.setInterval(() => {
        if (!state.host?.isConnected) {
          writeLog('error', 'lifecycle.health', 'The control panel was removed from the document while the keyboard handler was still active. The mode will deactivate to avoid invisible behavior.', {
            expectedHostId: HOST_ID,
            expectedLocator: `#${HOST_ID}`
          });
          destroy({ reason: 'host-removed' });
          return;
        }

        applyTheme();
      }, 2000);

      addCleanup(() => window.clearInterval(healthInterval));

      writeLog('info', 'lifecycle.activate', 'Enter to Newline mode was activated successfully.', {
        version: VERSION,
        sendShortcut: sendShortcutLabel,
        editableLocators: locators.editable.map(locator => `${locator.id}:${locator.selector}`).join(' | '),
        sendLocators: locators.send.map(locator => `${locator.id}:${locator.selector}`).join(' | ')
      });
      setStatus('success', `Active. Enter inserts a new line; ${sendShortcutLabel} sends.`);
    } catch (error) {
      reportError('lifecycle.activate', error, {
        expectedHostId: HOST_ID,
        expectedDocumentRoot: 'document.documentElement'
      });
      destroy({ reason: 'activation-failed' });
    }
  };

  setup();
})();
